mapper.sql: co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , co.LEARNING_MODEL_ID , co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.no as outputNo , ci.*
mapper.update: UPDATE CARD_OUTPUT ci INNER JOIN CARD_LEARNING_DATA co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD SET ci.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(ci.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, co.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE ci.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END, ci.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(ci.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(co.BRCD, '-', co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE ci.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END, ci.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(ci.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE ci.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END
